title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster. The video argues this reveals Anthropic's weakness in vertical integration compared to competitors, and suggests the AI race is shifting toward infrastructure control, chips, and datacenter capabilities rather than benchmarks alone.
